series_metadata.series_description: Series contains consumer complaints regarding a business, school or individual. Series also contains records transferred on 01/21/2018 previously under series authorization number 50040003, agency series 877007. As of 01/21/2018 the State Cosmetology and Barber Board processes and retains all records from the Ohio State Barber Board per the enactment of H.B. 49.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: investigation is complete or scanned machine-readable format, whichever occurs first, unless matter goes hearing. ; Electronic: investigation is complete and case is closed, including all appeals
